pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly creates the old watchlist directory as "My Watchlist".
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicit define the new watchlist directory as "Tech Giants".
setup_task.sh explicitly populates realtimestock.csv with exactly these 5 stock tickers.
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh hardcode this exact path as the WATCHLIST_BASE.

privileged_info_summary: Verified the setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts. Confirmed the task uses synthetically generated data to populate a JStock watchlist named "My Watchlist" located at "/home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState/watchlist". It accurately expects the watchlist to contain exactly 5 stocks (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, NVDA) and targets renaming the watchlist to "Tech Giants".
